title: Swipe left, previous screen
scenario: Swiping left from the sixth onboarding screen navigates back through screens in order and stops at the second screen
steps: 1. Start the app and navigate to the sixth screen of the Onboarding flow.
2. Swipe left from the sixth screen.
3. Observe that the user navigates to the fifth screen.
5. Observe that the user navigates to the fourth screen.
7. Observe that the user navigates to the third screen.
9. Observe that the user navigates to the second screen.
10. Swipe left again from the second screen.
11. Observe that the swipe has no effect and the user remains on the second screen.
12. Verify that all screens (sixth, fifth, fourth, third, second) match the Figma design.
expected: Swiping left from the sixth screen navigates back through the fifth, fourth, third, and second screens in order. Further left swipes from the second screen have no effect. All screens match the Figma design.
